items.s20.b13.paragraph: 플릿 사이트 CR 을 관리하는 `/update` 폴더 및 Git 리포지터리에서 구성 및 배포 소스 CR 간 변경 사항을 비교합니다.
items.s301.b5.table.cell.0.0: [CODE language="yaml" wrap_hint="true" overflow_hint="toggle"] plan: - actions: ["Prep", "Upgrade", "FinalizeUpgrade"] rolloutStrategy: maxConcurrency: 200 timeout: 60 [/CODE]
items.s301.b5.table.cell.1.0: [CODE language="yaml" wrap_hint="true" overflow_hint="toggle"] plan: - actions: ["Prep", "Upgrade"] rolloutStrategy: maxConcurrency: 200 timeout: 60 - actions: ["FinalizeUpgrade"] rolloutStrategy: maxConcurrency: 500 timeout: 10 [/CODE]
items.s301.b5.table.cell.2.0: [CODE language="yaml" wrap_hint="true" overflow_hint="toggle"] plan: - actions: ["Prep"] rolloutStrategy: maxConcurrency: 200 timeout: 60 - actions: ["Upgrade"] rolloutStrategy: maxConcurrency: 200 timeout: 20 - actions: ["FinalizeUpgrade"] rolloutStrategy: maxConcurrency: 500 timeout: 10 [/CODE]
items.s89.b3.paragraph: 권장 PTP Westport 채널 e810 그랜드마스터 클록 구성 (`PtpConfigGmWpc.yaml`)
